mapper.select: SELECT CGCM.CD_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_MST@DL_MSP CGM , CMN_GRP_CD_MST@DL_MSP CGCM WHERE CGM.GRP_ID = CGCM.GRP_ID AND CGM.USG_YN = 'Y' AND CGCM.USG_YN = 'Y' AND CGM.GRP_ID = 'CMN0202'

/* mPlatformMapper.getRequestInfo */ SELECT A.AGENT_CODE AS asgnAgncId , REPLACE(A.OPER_TYPE, '3', '') AS orderTypeCd , (CASE WHEN #{appEventCd} IN ('PC0', 'OP0') THEN DECODE(A.OPER_TYPE, 'NAC3', 'OsstSvcPrcService', 'MNP3', 'OsstNpSvcPrcService', '') WHEN #{appEventCd} IN ('NU1', 'NU2') THEN 'OsstSvcNoService' WHEN #{appEventCd} IN ('CP0', 'EP0', 'MP0') THEN 'OsstCanSvcPrcService' WHEN #{appEventCd} IN ('NP1', 'NP2') THEN 'OsstNpSvcPrcService' WHEN #{appEventCd} IN ('FPC0', 'FOP0') THEN 'OsstFrmpapSvcPrcSOService' WHEN #{appEventCd} IN ('FS5') THEN 'OsstOnlineFrmpapService' ELSE 'OsstSvcPrcService' END) AS serviceName , (CASE WHEN #{appEventCd} = 'PC0' THEN DECODE(A.OPER_TYPE, 'NAC3', 'osst:osstPrePrc', 'MNP3', 'osst:osstNpPrePrc', '') WHEN #{appEventCd} = 'NU1' THEN 'osst:inqrOsstSvcNoInfo' WHEN #{appEventCd} = 'NU2' THEN 'osst:resvOsstTlphNo' WHEN #{appEventCd} = 'OP0' THEN DECODE(A.OPER_TYPE, 'NAC3', 'osst:osstOpenPrc', 'MNP3', 'osst:osstNpOpenPrc', '') WHEN #{appEventCd} = 'ST1' THEN 'osst:osstPrcSch' WHEN #{appEventCd} = 'CP0' THEN 'osst:osstCanPps2Prc' WHEN #{appEventCd} = 'EP0' THEN 'osst:osstCanPrc' WHEN #{appEventCd} = 'MP0' THEN 'osst:osstCanM2mPrc' WHEN #{appEventCd} = 'NP1' THEN 'osst:osstNpBfacAgree' WHEN #{appEventCd} = 'NP2' THEN 'osst:osstNpPayAsert' WHEN #{appEventCd} = 'FPC0' THEN DECODE(A.OPER_TYPE, 'NAC3', 'osst:osstFrmpapPrePrc', 'MNP3', 'osst:osstFrmpapNpPrePrc', '') WHEN #{appEventCd} = 'FOP0' THEN DECODE(A.OPER_TYPE, 'NAC3', 'osst:osstFrmpapOpenPrc', 'MNP3', 'osst:osstFrmpapNpOpenPrc', '') WHEN #{appEventCd} = 'FS5' THEN 'osst:osstOnlineFrmpapReg' ELSE '' END) AS operationName , (CASE WHEN #{appEventCd} IN ('PC0', 'FPC0') THEN 'OsstPrePrcInVO' WHEN #{appEventCd} = 'NU1' THEN 'InqrOsstSvcNoInfoInVO' WHEN #{appEventCd} = 'NU2' THEN 'ResvOsstTlphNoInVO' WHEN #{appEventCd} IN ('OP0', 'FOP0') THEN 'OsstOpenPrcInVO' WHEN #{appEventCd} = 'ST1' THEN 'OsstPrcSchInVO' WHEN #{appEventCd} = 'CP0' THEN 'OsstCanPps2PrcInVO' WHEN #{appEventCd} = 'EP0' THEN 'OsstCanPrcInVO' WHEN #{appEventCd} = 'MP0' THEN 'OsstCanPrcInVO' WHEN #{appEventCd} = 'NP1' THEN 'OsstNpPrePrcInVO' WHEN #{appEventCd} = 'NP2' THEN 'OsstNpPayAsertInVO' WHEN #{appEventCd} = 'FS5' THEN 'OsstOnlineFrmpapRegInVO' ELSE '' END) AS voName , #{resNo} AS resNo , LPAD(#{resNo}, 14, '0') AS mvnoOrdNo , #{appEventCd} AS appEventCd , #{gubun} AS gubun , #{tlphNo} AS wantTlphNo , (CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM NMCP_ACEN_REQ WHERE REQUEST_KEY = A.REQUEST_KEY) THEN NULL ELSE (SELECT KOS_ID FROM CMN_USR_MST@DL_MSP WHERE USR_ID = A.RVISN_ID) END) AS nstepUserId , A.FATH_TRANSAC_ID AS fathTransacId FROM MCP_REQUEST A WHERE A.RES_NO = #{resNo}

/* mPlatformMapper.getXmlMessagePC0 */ SELECT LPAD(A.RES_NO, 14, '0') AS mvnoOrdNo /* MVNO 오더번호 */ , 'KIS' AS slsCmpnCd /* 판매회사코드 */ , GCM2.ETC2 AS custTypeCd /* 고객유형코드 */ , GCM1.ETC1 AS custIdntNoIndCd /* 고객식별번호구분코드 */ , CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(DECODE(A.CSTMR_TYPE, 'FN', TRIM(B.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN), TRIM(B.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN))) AS custIdntNo /* 고객식별번호 */ , CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(TRIM(B.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_RRN)) AS crprNo /* 법인번호 */ , UPPER(B.CSTMR_NAME) AS custNm /* 고객명 */ , DECODE(RATE.PAY_CL_CD, 'PO', 'R', 'PP', 'I', 'R') AS cntrUseCd /* 계약용도코드 */ , (CASE WHEN NVL(C.MODEL_MONTHLY, '0') = '0' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) AS instYn /* 할부여부 */ , NVL(C.RECYCLE_YN, 'N') AS scnhndPhonInstYn /* 중고폰할부여부 */ , B.SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN AS myslAgreYn /* 본인동의여부 */ , GCM1.ETC2 AS nativeRlnamAthnEvdnPprCd , NVL(B.CSTMR_MOBILE_FN || B.CSTMR_MOBILE_MN || B.CSTMR_MOBILE_RN, B.CSTMR_TEL_FN || B.CSTMR_TEL_MN || B.CSTMR_TEL_RN) AS athnRqstcustCntplcNo /* 인증요청고객연락처번호 */ , B.SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT AS rsdcrtIssuDate /* 주민등록증발급일자 */ , (CASE WHEN GCM1.ETC2 = 'DRIVE' THEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(B.SELF_ISSU_NUM), 3) ELSE '' END) AS lcnsNo , (CASE WHEN GCM1.ETC2 = 'DRIVE' THEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(B.SELF_ISSU_NUM), 0, 2) ELSE '' END) AS lcnsRgnCd , (CASE WHEN GCM1.ETC2 = 'MERIT' THEN CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(B.SELF_ISSU_NUM) ELSE '' END) AS mrtrPrsnNo , (CASE WHEN A.CSTMR_TYPE = 'FN' THEN B.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION ELSE '' END) AS nationalityCd /* 외국인국적코드 */ , (CASE WHEN A.CSTMR_TYPE = 'FN' THEN B.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_BIRTH ELSE '' END) AS fornBrthDate /* 외국인생일일자 */ , 'Y' AS crdtInfoAgreYn /* 신용정보동의여부 */ , 'Y' AS indvInfoInerPrcuseAgreYn /* 개인정보활용동의여부 */ , DECODE(A.CLAUSE_JEHU_FLAG, 'Y', 'Y', 'N') AS cnsgInfoAdvrRcvAgreYn /* 위탁정보광고수신동의 */ , DECODE(A.PERSONAL_INFO_COLLECT_AGREE, 'Y', 'Y', 'N') AS othcmpInfoAdvrRcvAgreYn /* 타사정보광고수신동의 */ , DECODE(A.CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG, 'Y', 'Y', 'N') AS othcmpInfoAdvrCnsgAgreYn /* 타사정보광고위탁동의 */ , DECODE(A.OTHERS_TRNS_AGREE, 'Y', 'Y', 'N') AS fnncDealAgreeYn /* 금융거래시 KT 고객 추가 금융 혜택을 위한 정보 제공 동의 */ , DECODE(A.OTHERS_TRNS_KT_AGREE, 'Y', 'Y', 'N') AS grpAgntBindSvcSbscAgreYn /* 그룹사결합서비스가입동의 */ , DECODE(A.OTHERS_AD_RECEIVE_AGREE, 'Y', 'Y', 'N') AS cardInsrPrdcAgreYn /* 카드보험상품동의 */ , 'N' AS olngDscnHynmtrAgreYn /* 주유할인여부 */ , 'N' AS wlfrDscnAplyAgreYn /* 복지할인신청동의 */ , 'N' AS spamPrvdAgreYn /* 스팸제공동의 */ , NVL(A.PHONE_PAYMENT, 'N') AS prttlpStlmUseAgreYn /* 이동전화결제이용동의 */ , DECODE(A.PHONE_PAYMENT, 'Y', 'Y', 'N') AS prttlpStlmPwdUseAgreYn /* 이동전화결제비밀번호동의 */ , B.CSTMR_TEL_FN || B.CSTMR_TEL_MN || B.CSTMR_TEL_RN AS wrlnTlphNo /* 유선전화번호 */ , B.CSTMR_MOBILE_FN || B.CSTMR_MOBILE_MN || B.CSTMR_MOBILE_FN AS tlphNo /* 전화번호 */ , (CASE WHEN A.CSTMR_TYPE = 'JP' THEN '' ELSE '' END ) AS upjnCd /* 업종코드 */ , (CASE WHEN A.CSTMR_TYPE = 'JP' THEN '' ELSE '' END ) AS bcuSbst /* 업태코드 */ , TRIM(B.CSTMR_POST) AS zipNo /* 우편번호 */ , B.CSTMR_ADDR AS fndtCntplcSbst /* 기본주소 */ , B.CSTMR_ADDR_DTL AS mntCntplcSbst /* 상세주소 */ , B.CSTMR_MAIL AS emlAdrsNm /* 이메일 */ , 'N' AS custInfoChngYn /* 고객정보변경여부 */ , (CASE WHEN NVL(CIM.PRDT_TYPE_CD, '02') IN ('01', '02') THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) AS m2mHndsetYn /* M2M단말여부 */ , REPLACE(A.OPER_TYPE, '3', '') AS orderTypeCd /* 오더유형코드 */ , DECODE(A.OPER_TYPE, 'MNP3', D.MOVE_MOBILE_FN || D.MOVE_MOBILE_MN || D.MOVE_MOBILE_RN, '') AS npTlphNo /* 번호이동전화번호 */ , DECODE(A.CSTMR_TYPE, 'PP', 'Y', 'N') AS indvBizrYn /* 개인사업자여부 */ , (SELECT EXPNSN_STR_VAL1 FROM NMCP_CD_DTL WHERE CD_GROUP_ID ='NSC' AND DTL_CD = D.MOVE_COMPANY) AS bchngNpCommCmpnCd /* 번호이동전사업자코드 */ , D.MOVE_AUTH_TYPE AS athnItemCd /* 인증항목코드 */ , D.MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER AS athnSbst /* 인증항목값 */ , D.MOVE_REFUND_AGREE_FLAG AS ytrpaySoffAgreYn /* 해지미환급금상계동의여부 */ , 'N' AS npRstrtnContYn /* 번호이동제한예외여부 */ , B.SELF_CSTMR_CI AS ipinCi /*본인인증 후 취득한 CI 값*/ , (SELECT ETC5 FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST@DL_MSP WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP2001' AND CD_VAL = A.ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE) AS onlineAthnDivCd /* 본인인증 수단 */ , A.FATH_TRANSAC_ID , A.CPNT_ID FROM MCP_REQUEST A , MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR B , MCP_REQUEST_SALEINFO C , MCP_REQUEST_MOVE D , MSP_RATE_MST@DL_MSP RATE , CMN_GRP_CD_MST@DL_MSP GCM1 , CMN_GRP_CD_MST@DL_MSP GCM2 , CMN_INTM_MDL@DL_MSP CIM , ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST@DL_MSP OIM WHERE A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY AND A.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY AND A.REQUEST_KEY = D.REQUEST_KEY AND C.SOC_CODE = RATE.RATE_CD AND B.SELF_CERT_TYPE = GCM1.CD_VAL AND GCM1.GRP_ID = 'RCP2006' AND A.CSTMR_TYPE = GCM2.CD_VAL AND GCM2.GRP_ID = 'RCP9007' AND C.MODEL_ID = CIM.RPRS_PRDT_ID(+) AND CIM.RPRS_YN(+) = 'Y' AND A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID = OIM.ORGN_ID AND A.PSTATE = '00' AND A.RES_NO = #{resNo}

/* mPlatformMapper.getXmlMessageNU1 */ SELECT OSST.OSST_ORD_NO AS osstOrdNo /* OSST 오더번호 */ , A.AGENT_CODE AS asgnAgncId /* 할당대리점ID */ , 'Y' AS asgnAgncYn /* 할당번호조회여부 */ , 'KOR' AS cntryCd /* 국각코드 */ , OSST.CUST_ID AS custNo /* 고객번호 */ , '1' AS inqrBase /* 조회페이지 */ , '10' AS inqrCascnt /* 조회카운트 */ , '03' AS nowSvcIndCd /* 3G */ , '2' AS searchGubun /* 조회구분(1:예약번호, 2:희망번호, 3:Aging) */ , 'GEN' AS tlphNoChrcCd /* 전화번호특성코드 */ , '01' AS tlphNoIndCd /* 전화번호구분코드 */ , '010____' || NVL(#{wantTlphNo}, A.REQ_WANT_NUMBER) AS tlphNoPtrn /* 번호조회패턴 */ , DECODE(A.SERVICE_TYPE, 'PP', 'I', 'R') AS tlphNoUseCd /* 번호사용용도코드(R:일반, I:선불) */ , DECODE(A.SERVICE_TYPE, 'PP', 'FUK', '') AS tlphNoUseMntCd /* 선불인경우 */ FROM MCP_REQUEST A , MCP_REQUEST_OSST OSST WHERE LPAD(A.RES_NO, 14, '0') = OSST.MVNO_ORD_NO AND OSST.SEQ = (SELECT MAX(SEQ) FROM MCP_REQUEST_OSST WHERE MVNO_ORD_NO = OSST.MVNO_ORD_NO AND PRGR_STAT_CD = 'PC2' AND RSLT_CD = '0000') AND A.PSTATE = '00' AND A.RES_NO = #{resNo}

/* mPlatformMapper.getXmlMessageNU2 */ SELECT B.OSST_ORD_NO AS osstOrdNo /* OSST오더번호 */ , NVL(#{gubun}, 'RSV') AS gubun /* 업무구분코드(RSV:예약, RRS:취소) */ , C.TLPH_NO AS tlphNo /* 전화번호 */ , B.CUST_ID AS custNo /* 고객번호 */ , NVL(#{gubun}, 'RSV') AS tlphNoStatChngRsnCd /* 전화번호상태변경사유코드 */ , DECODE(NVL(#{gubun}, 'RSV'), 'RSV', 'AR', 'AA') AS tlphNoStatCd /* 전화번호상태코드(AR:예약, AA:취소) */ , GCM1.ETC2 AS custTypeCd /* 고객유형코드 */ , '03' AS nowSvcIndCd /* 서비스구분코드 */ , DECODE(A.OPER_TYPE, 'MNP3', 'I', '') AS mnpIndCd /* 번호이동구분코드 */ , C.ENCD_TLPH_NO AS encdTlphNo /* 암호화전화번호 */ , A.AGENT_CODE AS asgnAgncId /* 할당대리점ID */ FROM MCP_REQUEST A , MCP_REQUEST_OSST B /* 고객정보 */ , MCP_REQUEST_OSST C /* 번호예약 */ , CMN_GRP_CD_MST@DL_MSP GCM1 /* 고객유형조회 */ WHERE LPAD(A.RES_NO, 14, '0') = B.MVNO_ORD_NO AND B.SEQ = (SELECT MAX(SEQ) FROM MCP_REQUEST_OSST WHERE MVNO_ORD_NO = B.MVNO_ORD_NO AND PRGR_STAT_CD = 'PC2' AND RSLT_CD = '0000') AND B.MVNO_ORD_NO = C.MVNO_ORD_NO AND C.SEQ = (SELECT MAX(SEQ) FROM MCP_REQUEST_OSST WHERE MVNO_ORD_NO = C.MVNO_ORD_NO AND PRGR_STAT_CD = 'NU2' AND RSLT_CD = '0000') AND A.CSTMR_TYPE = GCM1.CD_VAL AND GCM1.GRP_ID = 'RCP9007' AND A.PSTATE = '00' AND A.RES_NO = #{resNo}

/* mPlatformMapper.getXmlMessageOP0 */ SELECT OSST.OSST_ORD_NO AS osstOrdNo , OSST.CUST_ID AS custNo , B.CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE AS rqsshtPprfrmCd /* 청구서수신방법 */ , (CASE WHEN A.OPER_TYPE = 'NAC3' AND B.CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE = 'MB' THEN (SELECT TLPH_NO FROM MCP_REQUEST_OSST X WHERE MVNO_ORD_NO = OSST.MVNO_ORD_NO AND SEQ = (SELECT MAX(SEQ) FROM MCP_REQUEST_OSST WHERE MVNO_ORD_NO = X.MVNO_ORD_NO AND PRGR_STAT_CD = 'NU2' AND RSLT_CD = '0000') ) WHEN A.OPER_TYPE = 'MNP3' AND B.CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE = 'MB' THEN E.MOVE_MOBILE_FN || E.MOVE_MOBILE_MN || E.MOVE_MOBILE_RN ELSE '' END) AS rqsshtTlphNo /* 청구수신번호 */ , 'Y' AS rqsshtTlphNoHideYn /* 청구서전화번호숨김여부 */ , B.CSTMR_MAIL AS rqsshtEmlAdrsNm /* 청구이메일주소 */ , TRIM(B.CSTMR_POST) AS billZipNo /* 청구우편번호 */ , B.CSTMR_ADDR AS billFndtCntplcSbst /* 청구기본주소 */ , B.CSTMR_ADDR_DTL AS billMntCntplcSbst /* 청구상세주소 */ , A.REQ_PAY_TYPE AS blpymMthdCd /* 납부방법코드 */ , DECODE(A.REQ_PAY_TYPE, 'C', '99', '21') AS duedatDateIndCd /* 납기일자구분코드 */ , DECODE(A.REQ_PAY_TYPE, 'C', C.REQ_CARD_YY || C.REQ_CARD_MM, '') AS crdtCardExprDate /* 신용카드만기일자 */ , DECODE(A.REQ_PAY_TYPE, 'C', (SELECT EXPNSN_STR_VAL1 FROM NMCP_CD_DTL WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'CRD' AND DTL_CD = C.REQ_CARD_COMPANY), '') AS crdtCardKindCd , DECODE(A.REQ_PAY_TYPE, 'D', (SELECT EXPNSN_STR_VAL1 FROM NMCP_CD_DTL WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'BNK' AND DTL_CD = C.REQ_BANK), '') AS bankCd /* 은행코드 */ , (CASE WHEN A.REQ_PAY_TYPE = 'C' THEN CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(C.REQ_CARD_NO) WHEN A.REQ_PAY_TYPE = 'D' THEN CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(C.REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) ELSE '' END ) AS blpymMthdIdntNo /* 납부방법식별번호 */ , (CASE WHEN C.REQ_PAY_OTHER_FLAG = 'Y' AND A.REQ_PAY_TYPE = 'C' THEN UPPER(C.REQ_CARD_NAME) WHEN C.REQ_PAY_OTHER_FLAG = 'Y' AND A.REQ_PAY_TYPE = 'D' THEN UPPER(C.REQ_ACCOUNT_NAME) ELSE '' END) AS blpymCustNm /* 납부고객명, 타인납부시 처리 */ , (CASE WHEN C.REQ_PAY_OTHER_FLAG = 'Y' AND A.REQ_PAY_TYPE = 'C' THEN CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(C.REQ_CARD_RRN) WHEN C.REQ_PAY_OTHER_FLAG = 'Y' AND A.REQ_PAY_TYPE = 'D' THEN CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(C.REQ_ACCOUNT_RRN) ELSE '' END) AS blpymCustIdntNo /* 납부고객식별번호, 타인납부시 처리 */ , (SELECT ETC1 FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST@DL_MSP WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP2044' AND CD_VAL = 'BLPYHIDE') AS blpymMthdIdntNoHideYn /* 납부방법식별번호숨김 */ , (CASE WHEN A.ON_OFF_TYPE IN ('0', '3') THEN '03' ELSE '01' END) AS agreIndCd /* 동의자료코드 */ , (CASE WHEN A.ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE = 'S' THEN '01' WHEN A.ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE = 'C' THEN '03' WHEN A.ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE = 'X' THEN '04' ELSE '03' END) AS myslAthnTypeCd /* 본인인증타입코드 */ , (CASE WHEN A.CSTMR_TYPE = 'JP' THEN UPPER(B.CSTMR_NAME) ELSE '' END) AS realUseCustNm /* 실사용고객명 */ , A.AGENT_CODE AS mngmAgncId /* 관리점ID */ , A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID AS cntpntCd /* 접점코드 */ , A.SHOP_USM_ID AS slsPrsnId /* 판매자ID */ , A.REQ_USIM_SN AS iccId /* ICC ID */ , D.MODEL_ID AS intmMdlId /* 기기모델ID */ , A.REQ_PHONE_SN AS intmSrlNo /* 기기일련번호 */ , (CASE WHEN A.PROD_TYPE = '02' OR A.REQ_BUY_TYPE = 'UU' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS usimOpenYn /* 유심개통여부 */ , NVL(A.SPC_CODE, ( SELECT KTA.SLS_NO FROM MSP_KT_PLCY_MST@DL_MSP KTA , MSP_KT_PLCY_DISCOUNT@DL_MSP KTB , MSP_KT_PLCY_OPER@DL_MSP KTC , MSP_KT_PLCY_INST@DL_MSP KTD , MSP_KT_PLCY_ENGG@DL_MSP KTE WHERE KTA.PLCY_ID = KTB.PLCY_ID AND KTA.PLCY_ID = KTC.PLCY_ID AND KTA.PLCY_ID = KTD.PLCY_ID AND KTA.PLCY_ID = KTE.PLCY_ID AND KTA.USE_YN = 'Y' AND KTA.PPPO = A.SERVICE_TYPE AND KTA.PLCY_TYPE = DECODE(A.REQ_BUY_TYPE, 'MM', '01', DECODE(A.USIM_KINDS_CD,'09','03','02')) AND KTB.DC_TYPE = NVL(D.SPRT_TP, 'NN') AND KTC.OPER_TYPE = A.OPER_TYPE AND KTD.INST_CNT = NVL(D.MODEL_MONTHLY, '0') AND KTE.ENGG_CNT = NVL(D.ENGG_MNTH_CNT, '0') AND ROWNUM = 1)) AS spclSlsNo /* 특별판매번호 PLCY_TYPE = 01:단말기, 02:USIM, 03:ESIM(신규) */ , (CASE WHEN A.CSTMR_TYPE = 'JP' THEN '06' ELSE '' END) AS agntRltnCd /* 대리인관계코드(법인) */ , (CASE WHEN A.CSTMR_TYPE = 'JP' THEN '06' ELSE '' END) AS agntBrthDate /* 대리인생일일자(법인) */ , (CASE WHEN A.CSTMR_TYPE = 'JP' THEN UPPER(B.CSTMR_NAME) ELSE '' END) AS agntCustNm /* 대리인고객명(법인) */ , (CASE WHEN A.CSTMR_TYPE = 'JP' THEN B.CSTMR_TEL_FN || B.CSTMR_TEL_MN || B.CSTMR_TEL_RN ELSE '' END) AS homeTlphNo /* 대리인연락처(법인) */ , D.SPRT_TP AS spnsDscnTypeCd /* 스폰서할인유형코드 */ , NVL(D.MODEL_DISCOUNT3, '0') AS agncSupotAmnt /* 대리점지원금액 */ , NVL(D.ENGG_MNTH_CNT, '0') AS enggMnthCnt /* 약정개월수 */ , D.MODEL_INSTALLMENT AS hndsetInstAmnt /* 단말할부금 */ , '0' AS hndsetPrpyAmnt /* 단말선납금 */ , NVL(D.MODEL_MONTHLY, '0') AS instMnthCnt /* 분납개월수 */ , DECODE(D.USIM_PAY_MTHD_CD, '1', 'N', '2', 'R', '3', 'B') AS usimPymnMthdCd /* USIM수납방법 */ , DECODE(D.JOIN_PAY_MTHD_CD, '1', 'P', '2', 'R', '3', 'I') AS sbscstPymnMthdCd /* 가입비수납방법 */ , DECODE(D.JOIN_PAY_MTHD_CD, '1', '37', '') AS sbscstImpsExmpRsnCd /* 가입비면제사유코드 */ , (SELECT ETC1 FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST@DL_MSP WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP2044' AND CD_VAL = 'BONDFEE') AS bondPrsrFeePymnMthdCd /* 채권보전료수납방법 */ , (CASE WHEN A.OPER_TYPE = 'NAC3' THEN ( SELECT TLPH_NO FROM MCP_REQUEST_OSST X WHERE X.MVNO_ORD_NO = OSST.MVNO_ORD_NO AND X.SEQ = (SELECT MAX(SEQ) FROM MCP_REQUEST_OSST WHERE MVNO_ORD_NO = X.MVNO_ORD_NO AND PRGR_STAT_CD = 'NU2' AND RSLT_CD = '0000')) ELSE E.MOVE_MOBILE_FN || E.MOVE_MOBILE_MN || E.MOVE_MOBILE_RN END) AS tlphNo /* 전화번호 */ , B.CSTMR_MAIL AS sbscPrtlstRcvEmlAdrsNm /* 가입내역서수신메일주소 */ , (SELECT ETC1 FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST@DL_MSP WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP2044' AND CD_VAL = 'NPFEE') AS npFeePayMethCd /* 번호이동수수료 수납방법코드 */ , DECODE(E.MOVE_THISMONTH_PAY_TYPE, 'NM', 'Y', 'SP', 'N', '') AS npBillMethCd /* 타사미청구금액청구방법코드 */ , DECODE(OSST.NP_HNDST_INST_AMT, 0, '1', DECODE(E.MOVE_ALLOTMENT_STAT, 'AD', '3', 'AD2', '2', 'FP', '1', '')) AS npHndsetInstaDuratDivCd /* 번호이동단말기분납지속구분코드*/ , (SELECT ETC1 FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST@DL_MSP WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP2044' AND CD_VAL = 'NPRMNY') AS npRmnyMethCd /* 번호이동수납방법코드 */ , '0' AS npTotRmnyAmt /* 번호이동총수납금액 */ , '0' AS npCashRmnyAmt /* 번호이동현금수납액 */ , '0' AS npCcardRmnyAmt /* 번호이동카드수납액 */ , (CASE WHEN A.OPER_TYPE = 'MNP3' AND E.MOVE_ALLOTMENT_STAT = 'AD' THEN E.MOVE_MOBILE_FN || E.MOVE_MOBILE_MN || E.MOVE_MOBILE_RN ELSE '' END) AS npHndsetInstaLmsTlphNo /* 번호이동단말기분납문자명세서전화번호 */ , A.USIM_KINDS_CD AS usimKindsCd -- 유심종류 09 eSIM , A.ESIM_PHONE_ID AS esimPhoneId -- ESIM_PHONE_ID , A.EID as esimUiccId ---esimUiccId , B.PRNTS_CTN as prntsCtn -- eSIM watch 모회선 전화번호 FROM MCP_REQUEST A , MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR B , MCP_REQUEST_REQ C , MCP_REQUEST_SALEINFO D , MCP_REQUEST_MOVE E , MCP_REQUEST_OSST OSST WHERE A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY AND A.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY AND A.REQUEST_KEY = D.REQUEST_KEY AND A.REQUEST_KEY = E.REQUEST_KEY AND LPAD(A.RES_NO, 14, '0') = OSST.MVNO_ORD_NO AND OSST.SEQ = (SELECT MAX(SEQ) FROM MCP_REQUEST_OSST WHERE MVNO_ORD_NO = LPAD(#{resNo}, 14, '0') AND PRGR_STAT_CD = 'PC2' AND RSLT_CD = '0000') AND A.PSTATE = '00' AND A.RES_NO = #{resNo} AND ROWNUM = 1

/* mPlatformMapper.getXmlMessageOP0Prod */
SELECT B.SOC_CODE AS prdcCd , 'P' AS prdcTypeCd , A.REQUEST_KEY AS requestKey , 0 AS additionKey FROM MCP_REQUEST A , MCP_REQUEST_SALEINFO B WHERE A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY AND A.RES_NO = #{resNo} UNION ALL SELECT C.SOC AS prdcCd , 'R' AS prdcTypeCd , A.REQUEST_KEY AS requestKey , MIN(B.ADDITION_KEY) AS additionKey FROM MCP_REQUEST A , MCP_REQUEST_ADDITION B , MCP_ADDITION C WHERE A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY AND B.ADDITION_KEY = C.ADDITION_KEY AND C.ACT_FLAG = 'Y' AND C.OSST_YN = 'Y' AND C.CHARGE_FLAG <> 'F' AND NVL(B.PROC_YN, 'N') <> 'Y' AND A.RES_NO = #{resNo} GROUP BY C.SOC, A.REQUEST_KEY

/* mPlatformMapper.getXmlMessageOP0Prod */
SELECT B.SOC_CODE AS prdcCd , 'P' AS prdcTypeCd , A.REQUEST_KEY AS requestKey , 0 AS additionKey FROM MCP_REQUEST A , MCP_REQUEST_SALEINFO B WHERE A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY AND A.RES_NO = #{resNo} UNION ALL SELECT C.SOC AS prdcCd , 'R' AS prdcTypeCd , A.REQUEST_KEY AS requestKey , B.ADDITION_KEY AS additionKey FROM MCP_REQUEST A , MCP_REQUEST_ADDITION B , MCP_ADDITION C WHERE A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY AND B.ADDITION_KEY = C.ADDITION_KEY AND C.ACT_FLAG = 'Y' AND C.OSST_YN = 'Y' AND C.CHARGE_FLAG <> 'F' AND NVL(B.PROC_YN, 'N') <> 'Y' AND A.RES_NO = #{resNo} UNION ALL SELECT A.INSR_PROD_CD AS prdcCd , 'R' AS prdcTypeCd , A.REQUEST_KEY AS requestKey , 0 AS additionKey FROM MCP_REQUEST A , MSP_INTM_INSR_MST@DL_MSP B WHERE A.INSR_PROD_CD = B.INSR_PROD_CD AND B.USG_YN = 'Y' AND A.RES_NO = #{resNo}

/* mPlatformMapper.getXmlMessageNP1 */ SELECT #{npTlphNo} AS npTlphNo , #{moveCompany} AS bchngNpCommCmpnCd , 'KIS' AS slsCmpnCd , (SELECT ETC2 FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST@DL_MSP WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP9007' AND CD_VAL = #{cstmrType}) AS custTypeCd , DECODE(#{cstmrType}, 'PP', 'Y', 'N') AS indvBizrYn , (SELECT ETC1 FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST@DL_MSP WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP2006' AND CD_VAL = #{selfCertType}) AS custIdntNoIndCd , #{custIdntNo} AS custIdntNo , #{crprNo} AS crprNo , #{cstmrName} AS custNm , #{appEventCd} AS appEventCd , (SELECT KT_ORG_ID FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST@DL_MSP WHERE ORGN_ID = #{cntpntShopId}) AS asgnAgncId , 'OsstNpSvcPrcService' AS serviceName , 'osst:osstNpBfacAgree' AS operationName , 'OsstNpPrePrcInVO' AS voName FROM DUAL

/* mPlatformMapper.getXmlMessageNP2 */ SELECT OSST.OSST_ORD_NO AS osstOrdNo , 'KIS' AS slsCmpnCd /* 판매회사코드 */ , B.MOVE_MOBILE_FN || B.MOVE_MOBILE_MN || B.MOVE_MOBILE_RN AS npTlphNo /* 번호이동전화번호 */ , NVL(B.OSST_PAY_DAY, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS payAsertDt /* 납부주장일자 */ , NVL(OSST.NP_UNPAY_AMT, 0) AS payAsertAmt /* 납부주장금액 */ , B.OSST_PAY_TYPE AS payMethCd /* 납부방법 */ FROM MCP_REQUEST A , MCP_REQUEST_MOVE B , MCP_REQUEST_OSST OSST WHERE A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY AND LPAD(A.RES_NO, 14, 0) = OSST.MVNO_ORD_NO AND OSST.SEQ = (SELECT MAX(SEQ) FROM MCP_REQUEST_OSST WHERE MVNO_ORD_NO = OSST.MVNO_ORD_NO AND PRGR_STAT_CD = 'PC2' AND RSLT_CD = '2413') AND A.RES_NO = #{resNo}

/* mPlatformMapper.getXmlMessageNP3 */ SELECT #{npTlphNo} AS npTlphNo , #{moveCompany} AS bchngNpCommCmpnCd , #{appEventCd} AS appEventCd , (SELECT KT_ORG_ID FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST@DL_MSP WHERE ORGN_ID = #{cntpntShopId}) AS asgnAgncId , 'OsstNpSvcPrcService' AS serviceName , 'osst:osstNpBfacAgreeRpyRetv' AS operationName , 'OsstNpBfacAgreRpyRetvInVO' AS voName FROM DUAL

/* mPlatformMapper.getXmlMessageFS5 */ SELECT NVL( ( SELECT NEW_KT_ORG_ID FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST@DL_MSP WHERE ORGN_ID = NVL( MQT.SHOP_CD, MQT.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID) ) , NVL( MQT.SHOP_CD, MQT.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID ) ) AS CNTPNT_SHOP_ID , MQT.SPC_CODE AS SPCL_SLS_NO , MQT.RES_NO AS SRL_NO , 'KIS' AS SLS_CMPN_CD , ( CASE WHEN MQT.CSTMR_TYPE IN ('NA', 'NM', 'PP') THEN CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP( TRIM(MRCR.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN) ) WHEN MQT.CSTMR_TYPE = 'JP' THEN CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP( TRIM(MRCR.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_RRN) ) WHEN MQT.CSTMR_TYPE = 'FN' THEN NVL( TRIM(MRCR.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_DOD), CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP( TRIM(MRCR.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN) ) ) ELSE CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP( TRIM(MRCR.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN) ) END ) AS CUST_IDNT_NO , DECODE( MQT.OPER_TYPE , 'MNP3', DECODE( MQME.MOVE_REFUND_AGREE_FLAG , 'Y', 'Y' , 'N' ) , '') AS TRMN_YET_RPYM_AMT_YN , ( CASE WHEN MQT.CSTMR_TYPE IN ('NA', 'NM', 'PP') THEN '01' WHEN MQT.CSTMR_TYPE = 'JP' THEN '03' WHEN MQT.CSTMR_TYPE = 'FN' THEN NVL2( MRCR.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_DOD, '06', '05' ) ELSE MQT.CSTMR_TYPE END ) AS CUST_IDNT_NO_IND_CD , MRSP.SOC_CODE AS PRDC_CD , DECODE( NVL( MQT.PROD_TYPE, '01') , '02', ( SELECT RPRS_PRDT_ID FROM CMN_INTM_MDL@DL_MSP WHERE PRDT_CODE = MQT.REQ_USIM_NAME) , MRSP.MODEL_ID ) AS HNDSET_MDL_ID , DECODE( MQT.OPER_TYPE , 'HDN3', 'HCN3' , MQT.OPER_TYPE ) AS IND_TYPE_CD , MRCR.CSTMR_NAME AS CUST_NM , DECODE( MQT.CSTMR_TYPE , 'FN', 'F' , 'N1' ) AS CUST_DTL_TYPE_CD , DECODE( MQT.CSTMR_TYPE , 'JP', CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP( TRIM(MRCR.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_RRN) ) , '' ) AS CRPR_NO , DECODE( MQT.CSTMR_TYPE , 'JP', 'B' , 'I' ) AS CUST_TYPE_CD , '00' AS WLFR_CD , NVL( MRCR.CSTMR_TEL_FN || MRCR.CSTMR_TEL_MN || MRCR.CSTMR_TEL_RN, '' ) AS WRLN_TLPH_NO , NVL( MRCR.CSTMR_MOBILE_FN || MRCR.CSTMR_MOBILE_MN || MRCR.CSTMR_MOBILE_RN, '' ) AS TLPH_NO , ( CASE WHEN MRCR.CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE = 'CB' OR MRCR.CSTMR_MAIL_RECEIVE_FLAG = 'Y' THEN MRCR.CSTMR_MAIL ELSE '' END ) AS EML_ADRS_NM , DECODE( MRCR.CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE , 'CB', 'Y' , 'N' ) AS EML_BILL_AGRE_YN , MRCR.CSTMR_ADDR AS BILL_ADRS_DONG_NM , MRCR.CSTMR_ADDR_DTL AS BILL_ADRS_NM , MRCR.CSTMR_POST AS BILL_ADRS_ZIP_NO , ( CASE WHEN MQT.REQ_PAY_TYPE IN ('C', 'D') THEN NVL( MQT.REQ_PAY_TYPE, '' ) WHEN MQT.REQ_PAY_TYPE IN ('AA', 'VA') THEN '' ELSE 'R' END ) AS BLPYM_MTHD_CD , NVL( MRRQ.REQ_CARD_COMPANY , ( SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST@DL_MSP WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP9009' AND CD_VAL = MRRQ.REQ_BANK ) ) AS BLPYM_BANK_NM , DECODE( MQT.CSTMR_TYPE , 'JP', CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP( TRIM(MRCR.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_RRN) ) , DECODE( MQT.REQ_PAY_TYPE , 'C', SUBSTR( CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP( TRIM(MRRQ.REQ_CARD_RRN) ), 1, 6 ) , 'D', SUBSTR( CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP( TRIM(MRRQ.REQ_ACCOUNT_RRN) ), 1, 6 ) , ( CASE WHEN TRIM(MRRQ.REQ_CARD_NO) IS NOT NULL AND MRRQ.REQ_CARD_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN SUBSTR( CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP( TRIM(MRRQ.REQ_CARD_RRN) ), 1, 6 ) WHEN TRIM(MRRQ.REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) IS NOT NULL AND MRRQ.REQ_ACCOUNT_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN SUBSTR( CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP( TRIM(MRRQ.REQ_ACCOUNT_RRN) ), 1, 6 ) ELSE '' END ) ) ) AS BLPYM_CUST_INHB_RGST_NO , DECODE( MQT.REQ_PAY_TYPE , 'C', MRRQ.REQ_CARD_NAME , 'D', MRRQ.REQ_ACCOUNT_NAME , ( CASE WHEN TRIM(MRRQ.REQ_CARD_NO) IS NOT NULL AND MRRQ.REQ_CARD_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN MRRQ.REQ_CARD_NAME WHEN TRIM(MRRQ.REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) IS NOT NULL AND MRRQ.REQ_ACCOUNT_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN MRRQ.REQ_ACCOUNT_NAME ELSE '' END ) ) AS BLPYM_CUST_NM , CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP( DECODE( MQT.REQ_PAY_TYPE , 'C', TRIM(MRRQ.REQ_CARD_NO) , ( CASE WHEN TRIM(MRRQ.REQ_CARD_NO) IS NOT NULL AND MRRQ.REQ_CARD_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN TRIM(MRRQ.REQ_CARD_NO) ELSE '' END ) ) ) AS CRDT_CARD_NO , DECODE( MQT.REQ_PAY_TYPE , 'C', MRRQ.REQ_CARD_YY || MRRQ.REQ_CARD_MM , ( CASE WHEN TRIM(MRRQ.REQ_CARD_NO) IS NOT NULL AND MRRQ.REQ_CARD_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN MRRQ.REQ_CARD_YY || MRRQ.REQ_CARD_MM ELSE '' END ) ) AS EFCT_YM , CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP( DECODE( MQT.REQ_PAY_TYPE , 'D', TRIM(MRRQ.REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) , ( CASE WHEN TRIM(MRRQ.REQ_CARD_NO) IS NOT NULL AND MRRQ.REQ_CARD_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN TRIM(MRRQ.REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) ELSE '' END ) ) ) AS BLPYM_BNKACN_NO , MRSP.JOIN_PRICE_TYPE AS SBSCST_TYPE_CD , MRSP.USIM_PRICE_TYPE AS USIM_BILL_TYPE_CD , MQT.REQ_WANT_NUMBER AS CUST_FVRT_1_TLPH_NO , MQT.REQ_WANT_NUMBER2 AS CUST_FVRT_2_TLPH_NO , DECODE( MQT.OPER_TYPE , 'MNP3', MQME.MOVE_COMPANY , '' ) AS NOW_SBSC_TLCM_CD , DECODE( MQT.OPER_TYPE , 'MNP3' , NVL( MQME.MOVE_MOBILE_FN || MQME.MOVE_MOBILE_MN || MQME.MOVE_MOBILE_RN, '' ) , '' ) AS NOW_CUST_TLPH_NO , DECODE( NVL( MQT.PROD_TYPE, '01' ) , '02', '' , MQT.REQ_PHONE_SN ) AS MSN , MQT.REQ_USIM_SN AS ICC_ID , MQT.AGENT_CODE AS AGNC_ID , 'N' AS APLSHT_CNCL_YN , TO_CHAR(MQT.REQ_IN_DAY, 'YYYYMMDD') AS APLSHT_RGST_DATE , MQT.CLAUSE_PRI_COLLECT_FLAG AS INDV_INFO_INER_PRCUSE_AGRE_YN , NVL( MRAT.MINOR_AGENT_NAME, '' ) AS AGNT_NM , CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP( NVL2( MRAT.MINOR_AGENT_NAME , TRIM(MRAT.MINOR_AGENT_RRN) , '' ) ) AS AGNT_INHB_RGST_NO , NVL2( MRAT.MINOR_AGENT_NAME , TRIM(MRAT.MINOR_AGENT_RELATION) , '' ) AS AGNT_WRKJOB_IND_CD , DECODE( SUBSTR( MRAT.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN, 1, 2 ) , '01', NVL( MRAT.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN || MRAT.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN || MRAT.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_RN, '' ) , '' ) AS AGNT_PRTTLP_NO , DECODE( SUBSTR( MRAT.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN, 1, 2 ) , '01', '' , NVL( MRAT.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN || MRAT.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN || MRAT.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_RN, '' ) ) AS AGNT_HOUS_TLPH_NO , CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP( DECODE( MQT.CSTMR_TYPE , 'JP', TRIM(MRCR.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN) , '' ) ) AS REAL_USER_INHB_RGST_NO , DECODE( MQT.CSTMR_TYPE , 'JP', MRCR.CSTMR_NAME , '' ) AS REAL_USER_NM , MQT.ONLINE_AUTH_INFO AS MEMO_SBST , DECODE( MQT.CSTMR_TYPE , 'JP', TRIM(MRCR.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_NUMBER) , 'PP', TRIM(MRCR.CSTMR_PRIVATE_NUMBER) , '' ) AS BIZR_RGST_NO , MRCR.CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE AS RQSSHT_DSPT_TYPE_CD , DECODE( MQT.SERVICE_TYPE , 'PP', 'I' , 'R' ) AS USIM_PYMN_MTHD_CD , ( CASE WHEN REQ_BUY_TYPE = 'UU' OR MQT.PROD_TYPE = '02' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END ) AS USIM_UNIQ_OPEN_YN , 'R' AS BOND_PRSR_FEE_CD , MRSP.MODEL_DISCOUNT1 AS HNDSET_DSCN_1_AMNT , NVL( MRSP.MODEL_MONTHLY, '' ) AS INST_MNTH_CNT , NVL( MRSP.ENGG_MNTH_CNT, '' ) AS ENGG_MNTH_CNT , DECODE( MQT.USIM_KINDS_CD , '09', 'E' , '' ) AS USIM_TYPE_DIV_CD , ( CASE WHEN MQT.OPER_TYPE IN ('HCN3', 'HDN3') THEN ( SELECT SVC_CNTR_NO FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP WHERE SUB_STATUS <> 'C' AND SUBSCRIBER_NO = NVL(MRCR.CSTMR_TEL_FN || MRCR.CSTMR_TEL_MN || MRCR.CSTMR_TEL_RN , MRCR.CSTMR_MOBILE_FN || MRCR.CSTMR_MOBILE_MN || MRCR.CSTMR_MOBILE_RN) ) ELSE '' END ) AS SVC_CNTR_NO , MRCR.SELF_CSTMR_CI AS IPIN_CI , NVL2( MRCR.SELF_CSTMR_CI , 'Y' , 'N' ) AS MY_SELF_ATHN_YN , NVL2( MRCR.SELF_CSTMR_CI , ( SELECT ETC5 FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST@DL_MSP WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP2001' AND USG_YN = 'Y' AND CD_VAL = MQT.ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE ) , '' ) AS ONLINE_ATHN_DIV_CD , 'Y' AS CRDT_INFO_AGRE_YN , DECODE(MQT.CLAUSE_JEHU_FLAG, 'Y', 'Y', 'N') AS CSGN_INFO_ADVM_RCV_AGREE_YN , DECODE(MQT.PERSONAL_INFO_COLLECT_AGREE, 'Y', 'Y', 'N') AS OTCOM_INFO_ADVM_RCV_AGREE_YN , DECODE(MQT.CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG, 'Y', 'Y', 'N') AS OTCOM_INFO_ADVM_CSGN_AGREE_YN , DECODE(MQT.OTHERS_TRNS_AGREE, 'Y', 'Y', 'N') AS FNNC_DEAL_AGREE_YN , DECODE(MQT.OTHERS_TRNS_KT_AGREE, 'Y', 'Y', 'N') AS GPCOM_COMSVC_SBSC_AGREE_YN , DECODE(MQT.OTHERS_AD_RECEIVE_AGREE, 'Y', 'Y', 'N') AS CARD_INSUR_PROD_AGREE_YN , MQT.FATH_TRANSAC_ID , (CASE WHEN NVL(CIM.PRDT_TYPE_CD, '02') IN ('01', '02') THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) AS M2M_HNDSET_YN /* M2M단말여부 */ FROM MCP_REQUEST MQT , MCP_REQUEST_AGENT MRAT , MCP_REQUEST_CHANGE MRCE , MCP_REQUEST_MOVE MQME , MCP_REQUEST_PAYMENT MRPT , MCP_REQUEST_REQ MRRQ , MCP_REQUEST_SALEINFO MRSP , MCP_REQUEST_DLVRY MRDY , MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR MRCR , CMN_INTM_MDL@DL_MSP CIM WHERE MQT.RES_NO = #{resNo} AND MQT.REQUEST_KEY = MRAT.REQUEST_KEY AND MQT.REQUEST_KEY = MRCE.REQUEST_KEY AND MQT.REQUEST_KEY = MQME.REQUEST_KEY AND MQT.REQUEST_KEY = MRPT.REQUEST_KEY AND MQT.REQUEST_KEY = MRRQ.REQUEST_KEY AND MQT.REQUEST_KEY = MRSP.REQUEST_KEY AND MQT.REQUEST_KEY = MRDY.REQUEST_KEY AND MQT.REQUEST_KEY = MRCR.REQUEST_KEY AND MRSP.MODEL_ID = CIM.RPRS_PRDT_ID(+) AND CIM.RPRS_YN(+) = 'Y'

/* mPlatformMapper.getXmlMessageUC0 */ SELECT A.MVNO_ORD_NO as mvnoOrdNo , A.CUST_NO as custNo , A.TLPH_NO as tlphNo , A.SVC_CONT_ID as svcContId , A.ODER_TYPE_CD as oderTypeCd , A.USIM_PYMN_MTHD_CD as usimPymnMthdCd , A.ICC_ID as iccId , A.CNTPNT_CD as cntpntCd , A.SLS_PRSN_ID as slsPrsnId , A.USIM_CHG_RSN_CD as usimChgRsnCd , 'osst:usimChgPrc' as operationName , 'OsstUsimChgInVO' as voName , 'UC0' AS appEventCd , B.DEALER_CODE AS asgnAgncId , 'OsstUsimChgPrcService' AS serviceName FROM MCP_SELF_USIM_CHG A, MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP B WHERE A.SVC_CONT_ID = B.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND A.MVNO_ORD_NO = #{mvnoOrdNo}

SELECT /* mPlatformMapper.selectCheckMpCallCount 당일 MP호출 수 */ count(*) FROM MCP_MPLATFORM_LOG WHERE 1=1 AND EVENT_CODE = #{eventCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND USER_ID = #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND SYS_DT = TO_CHAR(sysdate , 'YYYYMMDD') AND ACCESS_URL IS NOT NULL

/* mPlatformMapper.getXmlMessageMC0 */ SELECT 'osst:osstMcnPrechk' as operationName , 'OsstMcnPrechkInVO' as voName , 'OsstMcnChgPrcService' AS serviceName , 'MC0' AS appEventCd , (SELECT KT_ORG_ID FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST@DL_MSP WHERE ORGN_ID = '1100011741' AND ROWNUM = 1) AS asgnAgncId /*양도인정보*/ , LPAD(A.MCN_RES_NO, 14, '0') AS mvnoOrdNo /* MVNO 오더번호 */ , 'KIS' AS slsCmpnCd /* 판매회사코드 */ , A.CSTMR_TYPE AS cstmrType /* 고객타입(NA,FN,NA,JP) */ , SUB.CUSTOMER_ID AS custNo /* 고객번호 */ , SUB.SVC_CNTR_NO AS svcContId /* 계약번호 */ , B.MOBILE_NO AS tlphNo /* 전화번호 */ , A.MCN_STAT_RSN_CD AS mcnStatRsnCd /* 명변 사유코드 */ , A.USIM_SUCC_YN AS usimSuccYn /* USIM 승계여부 */ , A.ICC_ID AS iccId /* USIM 일련번호 */ /*양수인고객정보*/ , (SELECT ETC2 FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST@DL_MSP WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP9007' AND CD_VAL = A.CSTMR_TYPE) AS custTypeCd /* 고객유형코드 */ , GCM1.ETC1 AS custIdntNoIndCd /* 고객식별번호구분코드 */ , CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(TRIM(A.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN)) AS custIdntNo /* 고객식별번호 */ , UPPER(A.CSTMR_NAME) AS custNm /* 고객명 */ , 'Y' AS myslAgreYn /* 본인동의여부 */ , GCM1.ETC2 AS nativeRlnamAthnEvdnPprCd /* 실명인증증빙서류코드 */ , NVL(A.CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_FN || A.CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_MN || A.CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_RN, '') AS athnRqstcustCntplcNo /* 인증요청고객연락처번호 */ , A.SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT AS rsdcrtIssuDate /* 주민등록증발급일자 */ , (CASE WHEN GCM1.ETC2 = 'DRIVE' THEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(A.SELF_ISSU_NUM), 3) ELSE '' END) AS lcnsNo /* 면허번호 */ , (CASE WHEN GCM1.ETC2 = 'DRIVE' THEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(A.SELF_ISSU_NUM), 0, 2) ELSE '' END) AS lcnsRgnCd /* 면허지역코드 */ , (CASE WHEN GCM1.ETC2 = 'MERIT' THEN CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(A.SELF_ISSU_NUM) ELSE '' END) AS mrtrPrsnNo /* 유공자번호 */ , (CASE WHEN A.CSTMR_TYPE = 'FN' THEN A.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION ELSE '' END) AS nationalityCd /* 외국인국적코드 */ , (CASE WHEN A.CSTMR_TYPE = 'FN' THEN CASE WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(A.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN), 7, 1) IN ('5', '6') THEN '19' || SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(A.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN), 1, 6) WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(A.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN), 7, 1) IN ('7', '8') THEN '20' || SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(A.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN), 1, 6) END END) AS fornBrthDate /* 외국인생일일자 */ , 'Y' AS crdtInfoAgreYn /* 신용정보동의여부 */ , 'Y' AS indvInfoInerPrcuseAgreYn /* 개인정보활용동의여부 */ , DECODE(A.CLAUSE_JEHU_FLAG, 'Y', 'Y', 'N') AS cnsgInfoAdvrRcvAgreYn /* 위탁정보광고수신동의 */ , DECODE(A.PERSONAL_INFO_COLLECT_AGREE, 'Y', 'Y', 'N') AS othcmpInfoAdvrRcvAgreYn /* 타사정보광고수신동의 */ , DECODE(A.CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG, 'Y', 'Y', 'N') AS othcmpInfoAdvrCnsgAgreYn /* 타사정보광고위탁동의 */ , DECODE(A.OTHERS_TRNS_KT_AGREE, 'Y', 'Y', 'N') AS grpAgntBindSvcSbscAgreYn /* 그룹사결합서비스가입동의 */ , DECODE(A.OTHERS_AD_RECEIVE_AGREE, 'Y', 'Y', 'N') AS cardInsrPrdcAgreYn /* 카드보험상품동의 */ , 'N' AS olngDscnHynmtrAgreYn /* 주유할인여부 */ , 'N' AS wlfrDscnAplyAgreYn /* 복지할인신청동의 */ , 'N' AS spamPrvdAgreYn /* 스팸제공동의 */ , 'N' AS prttlpStlmUseAgreYn /* 이동전화결제이용동의 */ , 'N' AS prttlpStlmPwdUseAgreYn /* 이동전화결제비밀번호동의 */ , B.ETC_MOBILE AS wrlnTlphNo /* 유선전화번호 */ , (CASE WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(A.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN), 7, 1) IN ('1', '2', '5', '6') THEN '19' || SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(A.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN), 1, 6) WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(A.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN), 7, 1) IN ('3', '4', '7', '8') THEN '20' || SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(A.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN), 1, 6) END) AS brthDate /* 생일일자 */ , A.REQ_INFO_CHG_YN AS custInfoChngYn /* 고객정보변경여부 */ , 'Y' AS myslfAthnYn /* 본인인증여부 */ , A.SELF_CSTMR_CI as ipinCi /* 본인인증CI */ , (SELECT ETC5 FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST@DL_MSP WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP2001' AND CD_VAL = A.ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE) AS onlineAthnDivCd /* 본인인증 수단 */ , DECODE(A.OTHERS_TRNS_AGREE, 'Y', 'Y', 'N') AS fnncDealAgreeYn /* 금융거래시 KT 고객 추가 금융 혜택을 위한 정보 제공 동의 */ , A.FATH_TRANSAC_ID AS fathTransacId /* 안면인증 트랜잭션 아이디 */ , '1100011741' AS cpntId /* 접점아이디 */ /*양수인청구계정정보*/ , A.CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE AS rqsshtPprfrmCd /* 청구서양식코드 */ , DECODE(A.CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE, 'MB', B.MOBILE_NO, '') AS rqsshtTlphNo /* 청구서발송전화번호 */ , DECODE(A.CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE, 'CB', A.CSTMR_MAIL, '') AS rqsshtEmlAdrsNm /* 청구서이메일주소명 */ , A.CSTMR_POST AS billZipNo /* 청구우편번호 */ , A.CSTMR_ADDR AS billFndtCntplcSbst /* 청구기본연락처내용 - 주소 */ , A.CSTMR_ADDR_DTL AS billMntCntplcSbst /* 청구기본연락처내용 - 상세 */ , A.REQ_PAY_TYPE AS blpymMthdCd /* 납부방법코드 C: 신용카드, D: 계좌자동이체, R: 지로 */ , DECODE(A.REQ_PAY_TYPE, 'C', '99', '21') AS duedatDateIndCd /* 납기일자구분코드 */ , DECODE(A.REQ_PAY_TYPE, 'C', A.REQ_CARD_YY || A.REQ_CARD_MM, '') AS crdtCardExprDate /* 신용카드만기일자 */ , DECODE(A.REQ_PAY_TYPE, 'C', (SELECT EXPNSN_STR_VAL1 FROM NMCP_CD_DTL WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'CRD' AND DTL_CD = A.REQ_CARD_COMPANY), '') AS crdtCardKindCd /* 신용카드종류코드 */ , DECODE(A.REQ_PAY_TYPE, 'D', (SELECT EXPNSN_STR_VAL1 FROM NMCP_CD_DTL WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'BNK' AND DTL_CD = A.REQ_BANK), '') AS bankCd /* 은행코드 */ , (CASE WHEN A.REQ_PAY_TYPE = 'C' THEN CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(A.REQ_CARD_NO) WHEN A.REQ_PAY_TYPE = 'D' THEN CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(A.REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) ELSE '' END) AS blpymMthdIdntNo /* 납부방법식별번호 */ , UPPER(A.CSTMR_NAME) AS blpymCustNm /* 납부고객명 */ , (CASE WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(A.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN), 7, 1) IN ('1', '2', '5', '6') THEN '19' || SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(A.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN), 1, 6) WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(A.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN), 7, 1) IN ('3', '4', '7', '8') THEN '20' || SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(A.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN), 1, 6) END) AS blpymCustIdntNo /* 납부고객식별번호 */ , '03' AS agreIndCd /* 동의자료코드 */ , (CASE WHEN A.ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE = 'S' THEN '01' WHEN A.ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE = 'C' THEN '03' WHEN A.ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE = 'X' THEN '04' ELSE '03' END) AS myslAthnTypeCd /* 본인인증타입코드 */ /*상품정보*/ , A.SOC AS prdcCd /* 상품코드 */ , 'P' AS prdcTypeCd /* 상품타입코드 */ FROM NMCP_CUST_REQUEST_NAME_CHG A , NMCP_CUST_REQUEST_MST B , CMN_GRP_CD_MST@DL_MSP GCM1 , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP SUB WHERE A.CUST_REQ_SEQ = B.CUST_REQ_SEQ AND A.SELF_CERT_TYPE = GCM1.CD_VAL AND GCM1.GRP_ID = 'RCP2006' AND A.MCN_RES_NO = #{mcnResNo} AND B.CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM

/* mPlatformMapper.getXmlMessageMC0Nm */ SELECT 'osst:osstMcnPrechk' as operationName , 'OsstMcnPrechkInVO' as voName , 'OsstMcnChgPrcService' AS serviceName , 'MC0' AS appEventCd , (SELECT KT_ORG_ID FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST@DL_MSP WHERE ORGN_ID = '1100011741' AND ROWNUM = 1) AS asgnAgncId /*작업기준정보*/ , LPAD(A.MCN_RES_NO, 14, '0') AS mvnoOrdNo /* MVNO 오더번호 */ , 'KIS' AS slsCmpnCd /* 판매회사코드 */ , A.CSTMR_TYPE AS cstmrType /* 고객타입(NA,FN,NA,JP) */ , SUB.CUSTOMER_ID AS custNo /* 고객번호 */ , SUB.SVC_CNTR_NO AS svcContId /* 계약번호 */ , B.MOBILE_NO AS tlphNo /* 전화번호 */ , A.MCN_STAT_RSN_CD AS mcnStatRsnCd /* 명변 사유코드 */ , A.USIM_SUCC_YN AS usimSuccYn /* USIM 승계여부 */ , A.ICC_ID AS iccId /* USIM 일련번호 */ /*양수인 고객정보*/ , 'I' AS custTypeCd /* 양수인 고객유형코드 */ , '01' AS custIdntNoIndCd /* 고객식별번호구분코드 */ , CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(TRIM(A.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN)) AS custIdntNo /* 고객식별번호 */ , UPPER(A.CSTMR_NAME) AS custNm /* 고객명 */ , A.SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN AS myslAgreYn /* 본인동의여부 */ , 'COURT' AS nativeRlnamAthnEvdnPprCd /* 실명인증증빙서류코드 - 미성년자는 COURT 고정*/ , NVL(A.CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_FN || A.CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_MN || A.CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_RN, '') AS athnRqstcustCntplcNo /* 인증요청고객연락처번호 */ , '' AS rsdcrtIssuDate /* 주민등록증발급일자 */ , '' AS lcnsNo /* 면허번호 */ , '' AS lcnsRgnCd /* 면허지역코드 */ , '' AS mrtrPrsnNo /* 유공자번호 */ , (CASE WHEN A.CSTMR_TYPE = 'FN' THEN A.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION ELSE '' END) AS nationalityCd /* 외국인국적코드 */ , (CASE WHEN A.CSTMR_TYPE = 'FN' THEN CASE WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(A.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN), 7, 1) IN ('5', '6') THEN '19' || SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(A.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN), 1, 6) WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(A.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN), 7, 1) IN ('7', '8') THEN '20' || SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(A.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN), 1, 6) END END) AS fornBrthDate /* 외국인생일일자 */ , 'Y' AS crdtInfoAgreYn /* 신용정보동의여부 */ , 'Y' AS indvInfoInerPrcuseAgreYn /* 개인정보활용동의여부 */ , DECODE(A.CLAUSE_JEHU_FLAG, 'Y', 'Y', 'N') AS cnsgInfoAdvrRcvAgreYn /* 위탁정보광고수신동의 */ , DECODE(A.PERSONAL_INFO_COLLECT_AGREE, 'Y', 'Y', 'N') AS othcmpInfoAdvrRcvAgreYn /* 타사정보광고수신동의 */ , DECODE(A.CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG, 'Y', 'Y', 'N') AS othcmpInfoAdvrCnsgAgreYn /* 타사정보광고위탁동의 */ , DECODE(A.OTHERS_TRNS_KT_AGREE, 'Y', 'Y', 'N') AS grpAgntBindSvcSbscAgreYn /* 그룹사결합서비스가입동의 */ , DECODE(A.OTHERS_AD_RECEIVE_AGREE, 'Y', 'Y', 'N') AS cardInsrPrdcAgreYn /* 카드보험상품동의 */ , 'N' AS olngDscnHynmtrAgreYn /* 주유할인여부 */ , 'N' AS wlfrDscnAplyAgreYn /* 복지할인신청동의 */ , 'N' AS spamPrvdAgreYn /* 스팸제공동의 */ , 'N' AS prttlpStlmUseAgreYn /* 이동전화결제이용동의 */ , 'N' AS prttlpStlmPwdUseAgreYn /* 이동전화결제비밀번호동의 */ , B.ETC_MOBILE AS wrlnTlphNo /* 유선전화번호 */ , (CASE WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(A.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN), 7, 1) IN ('1', '2', '5', '6') THEN '19' || SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(A.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN), 1, 6) WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(A.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN), 7, 1) IN ('3', '4', '7', '8') THEN '20' || SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(A.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN), 1, 6) END) AS brthDate /* 생일일자 */ , A.REQ_INFO_CHG_YN AS custInfoChngYn /* 고객정보변경여부 */ /*미성년자일 때 법정대리인정보*/ , C.NEE_AGENT_NAME as agntCustNm /* 법정대리인 성명 */ , (CASE WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(C.NEE_AGENT_RRN), 7, 1) IN ('1', '2', '3', '4') THEN '1' WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(C.NEE_AGENT_RRN), 7, 1) IN ('5', '6', '7', '8') THEN '4' ELSE '' END) AS agntCustIdfyNoType /* 법정대리인 식별번호 종류 1 (주민번호) , 4(외국인등록번호) */ , CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(C.NEE_AGENT_RRN) as agntIdfyNoVal /* 법정대리인 고객식별번호 */ , (CASE WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(C.NEE_AGENT_RRN), 7, 1) IN ('1', '3', '5', '7') THEN '1' WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(C.NEE_AGENT_RRN), 7, 1) IN ('2', '4', '6', '8') THEN '2' END) agntPersonSexDiv /* 법정대리인 성별 1(남자), 2(여자) */ , 'Y' as agntAgreYn /* 법정대리인 정보조회 동의여부 */ , 'M' AS agntTelAthn /* 법정대리인 연락처 종류 M(모바일) , I(자택)*/ , C.NEE_AGENT_TEL_NO AS agntTelNo /* 대리인연락처 */ , C.NEE_AGENT_TYPE_CD AS agntTypeCd /* 법정대리인 유형 01(부), 02(모), 03(후견인), 04(연대보증인) */ , C.NEE_AGENT_SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT AS agntRsdcrtIssuDate /* 법정대리인 식별번호 발급일자 */ , '03' AS agntRltnCd /* 대리인관계코드 03: 법정대리인(미성년일 경우), 04: 위탁대리인, 06: 일회성대리인 */ , (CASE WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(C.NEE_AGENT_RRN), 7, 1) IN ('1', '2', '5', '6') THEN '19' || SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(C.NEE_AGENT_RRN), 1, 6) WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(C.NEE_AGENT_RRN), 7, 1) IN ('3', '4', '7', '8') THEN '20' || SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(C.NEE_AGENT_RRN), 1, 6) ELSE '' END) AS agntBrthDate /* 대리인생일일자 */ , (SELECT ETC2 FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST@DL_MSP WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP2006' AND CD_VAL = C.NEE_AGENT_SELF_CERT_TYPE) as agntRlnamAthnEvdnPprCd /* 법정대리인실명인증증빙서류코드 */ , (CASE WHEN C.NEE_AGENT_SELF_CERT_TYPE = '02' THEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(C.NEE_AGENT_SELF_ISSU_NUM), 0, 2) ELSE '' END) AS agntLicnsRgnCd /* 법정대리인 면허지역코드 */ , (CASE WHEN C.NEE_AGENT_SELF_CERT_TYPE = '02' THEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(C.NEE_AGENT_SELF_ISSU_NUM), 3) ELSE '' END) AS agntLicnsNo /* 법정대리인 면허번호 */ , (CASE WHEN C.NEE_AGENT_SELF_CERT_TYPE = '06' THEN C.NEE_AGENT_FOREIGNER_NATION ELSE '' END) AS agntNationalityCd /* 법정대리인 국적코드 */ , 'Y' AS myslfAthnYn /* 본인인증여부 */ , C.NEE_AGENT_SELF_CSTMR_CI as ipinCi /* 본인인증CI */ , (SELECT ETC5 FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST@DL_MSP WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP2001' AND CD_VAL = C.NEE_AGENT_ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE) AS onlineAthnDivCd /* 본인인증 수단 */ , DECODE(A.OTHERS_TRNS_AGREE, 'Y', 'Y', 'N') AS fnncDealAgreeYn /* 금융거래시 KT 고객 추가 금융 혜택을 위한 정보 제공 동의 */ , A.FATH_TRANSAC_ID AS fathTransacId /* 안면인증 트랜잭션 아이디 */ , '1100011741' AS cpntId /* 접점아이디 */ /*미성년자일 때 청구계정정보*/ , A.CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE AS rqsshtPprfrmCd /* 청구서양식코드 */ , DECODE(A.CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE, 'MB', B.MOBILE_NO, '') AS rqsshtTlphNo /* 청구서발송전화번호 */ , DECODE(A.CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE, 'CB', A.CSTMR_MAIL, '') AS rqsshtEmlAdrsNm /* 청구서이메일주소명 */ , A.CSTMR_POST AS billZipNo /* 청구우편번호 */ , A.CSTMR_ADDR AS billFndtCntplcSbst /* 청구기본연락처내용 - 주소 */ , A.CSTMR_ADDR_DTL AS billMntCntplcSbst /* 청구상세연락처내용 - 상세주소*/ , A.REQ_PAY_TYPE AS blpymMthdCd /* 납부방법코드 C: 신용카드, D: 계좌자동이체, R: 지로 */ , DECODE(A.REQ_PAY_TYPE, 'C', '99', '21') AS duedatDateIndCd /* 납기일자구분코드 */ , DECODE(A.REQ_PAY_TYPE, 'C', A.REQ_CARD_YY || A.REQ_CARD_MM, '') AS crdtCardExprDate /* 신용카드만기일자 */ , DECODE(A.REQ_PAY_TYPE, 'C', (SELECT EXPNSN_STR_VAL1 FROM NMCP_CD_DTL WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'CRD' AND DTL_CD = A.REQ_CARD_COMPANY), '') AS crdtCardKindCd /* 신용카드종류코드 */ , DECODE(A.REQ_PAY_TYPE, 'D', (SELECT EXPNSN_STR_VAL1 FROM NMCP_CD_DTL WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'BNK' AND DTL_CD = A.REQ_BANK), '') AS bankCd /* 은행코드 */ , (CASE WHEN A.REQ_PAY_TYPE = 'C' THEN CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(A.REQ_CARD_NO) WHEN A.REQ_PAY_TYPE = 'D' THEN CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(A.REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) ELSE '' END) AS blpymMthdIdntNo /* 납부방법식별번호 */ , C.NEE_AGENT_NAME as blpymCustNm /* 납부고객명 */ , (CASE WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(C.NEE_AGENT_RRN), 7, 1) IN ('1', '2', '5', '6') THEN '19' || SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(C.NEE_AGENT_RRN), 1, 6) WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(C.NEE_AGENT_RRN), 7, 1) IN ('3', '4', '7', '8') THEN '20' || SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(C.NEE_AGENT_RRN), 1, 6) ELSE '' END) AS blpymCustIdntNo /* 납부고객식별번호 */ , '03' AS agreIndCd /* 동의자료코드 */ , (CASE WHEN C.NEE_AGENT_ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE = 'S' THEN '01' WHEN C.NEE_AGENT_ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE = 'C' THEN '03' WHEN C.NEE_AGENT_ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE = 'X' THEN '04' ELSE '03' END) AS myslAthnTypeCd /* 본인인증타입코드 */ /*상품정보*/ , A.SOC AS prdcCd /* 상품코드 */ , 'P' AS prdcTypeCd /* 상품타입코드 */ FROM NMCP_CUST_REQUEST_NAME_CHG A , NMCP_CUST_REQUEST_MST B , NMCP_CUST_REQ_NAME_CHG_AGENT C , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP SUB WHERE A.CUST_REQ_SEQ = B.CUST_REQ_SEQ AND A.CUST_REQ_SEQ = C.CUST_REQ_SEQ AND B.CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.MCN_RES_NO = #{mcnResNo}

/* mPlatformMapper.getXmlMessageMcnMP0 */ SELECT 'osst:osstMcnChg' as operationName , 'OsstMcnChgInVO' as voName , 'OsstMcnChgPrcService' AS serviceName , 'MP0' AS appEventCd , (SELECT KT_ORG_ID FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST@DL_MSP WHERE ORGN_ID = '1100011741' AND ROWNUM = 1) AS asgnAgncId /* 대리점코드 */ , '1100011741' AS cntpntCd /* 접점코드 */ , OSST.OSST_ORD_NO AS osstOrdNo /* OSST 오더 번호 */ , SUB.CUSTOMER_ID AS custNo /* 양도인고객번호 */ , SUB.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS tlphNo /* 양도인 전화번호 */ , SUB.SVC_CNTR_NO AS svcContId /* 서비스계약번호(양도인 계약번호) */ , A.RCV_CUST_NO AS rcvCustNo /* 양수인고객번호 */ , A.RCV_BILL_ACNT_NO AS rcvBillAcntNo /* 양수인청구계정번호 */ , A.MCN_STAT_RSN_CD AS mcnStatRsnCd /* 명변 사유코드 */ , A.ICC_ID AS iccId /* USIM 일련번호 */ , 'N' AS usimPymnMthdCd /* USIM 수납방법 코드 */ , 'Y' AS docConfirmYn /* 증빙서류 확인 여부 */ , 'Y' AS followupYn /* 사후점검 이행 여부 */ , 'KIS' AS slsCmpnCd /* 판매회사코드 */ , B.ETC_MOBILE AS cntplcNo /* 연락처번호 - 양도인미납을위한연락처 */ FROM NMCP_CUST_REQUEST_NAME_CHG A , NMCP_CUST_REQUEST_MST B , MCP_REQUEST_OSST OSST , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP SUB WHERE A.CUST_REQ_SEQ = B.CUST_REQ_SEQ AND B.CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM AND LPAD(A.MCN_RES_NO, 14, '0') = OSST.MVNO_ORD_NO AND OSST.SEQ = (SELECT MAX(SEQ) FROM MCP_REQUEST_OSST WHERE MVNO_ORD_NO = LPAD(#{mcnResNo}, 14, '0') AND PRGR_STAT_CD = 'MC2' AND RSLT_CD = '0000') AND A.MCN_RES_NO = #{mcnResNo} AND ROWNUM = 1
